input: Run solution roadmap on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected solution roadmap output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the solution roadmap workflow

input: Apply solution roadmap to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive solution roadmap analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to solution roadmap

expected_behavior: Skill handles gracefully — requests minimum viable input or produces gap analysis
